description: Full-stack reactive web automation. TSX templates + pipeline DSL + 40 MCP tools in a single Rust binary. No build step.
rules: Import hooks from 'zeb', never from 'preact', 'react', or 'npm:preact/hooks'
Use @/ paths for component imports, never relative ../ between components
Pipeline DSL has two modes: pipe (| chains) for linear and graph ([id] + edges) for branching — don't mix
Templates use built-in Tailwind — no build step, no CSS files needed
Page entry is always: export default function Page(input) { return <jsx/>; }
Credentials are UI-only — DSL cannot read or write credential values
Dynamic config in pipelines uses {{ expr }} with $input, $trigger, $nodes scope variables
